use_cases: Visualize sales pipeline stages from prospects to closed deals
Track conversion rates across marketing funnel stages
Display B2B lead qualification flow metrics
Analyze e-commerce checkout funnel abandonment rates
ai_summary: A Reaviz-based funnel chart component for visualizing conversion pipelines and sales stages. Supports dark mode detection and includes data validation for handling invalid or missing data points. Renders a multi-stage funnel from prospects through closed won deals with interactive tooltips on hover. Part of a broader charting library, this composite component demonstrates typical business analytics visualization patterns for tracking customer acquisition and conversion metrics.
